title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer wants a stray `CC-0105` HTML comment removed from `docs/reference/backend/keystone-operator-packaging.md:399` and the "contract change" preamble (lines 12-20) stripped from the chainsaw e2e test, since the project has no stable release yet. They also want all the newly added regression/documentation/string-literal shell tests under `tests/unit/` and `tests/integration/` deleted, arguing such checks belong in PR review rather than the test suite at this pre-release stage.

code_comments.body:
Remove the comment from Markdown file

`<!-- CC-0105: operator targets `keystone-system` Namespace; workload (Keystone CR) stays in `openstack`. -->`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove lines 12-20 describing the "contract change" as this project did not have a stable release yet.
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: We are not going to add tests which test documentation for regressions! Remove the file `tests/unit/architecture/namespace_policy_doc_test.sh`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Absolutely not. We are not adding `tests/unit/hack/ci_deploy_operator_namespace_test.sh`. We are not testing code using string literals. And we are not testing for regressions in this PR, as 1) we control the namespace defintions and 2) there has never been a stable release of this project yet
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: No absolutely not. This is what pull request reviews are for. Remove `tests/unit/docs/namespace_consistency_test.sh`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove `tests/unit/deploy/helmrelease_namespaces_test.sh` for the reasons already mentioned
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove `tests/unit/deploy/kind_overlay_test.sh` for the reasons already mentioned
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove `tests/unit/deploy/namespaces_test.sh` for the reasons already mentioned
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove `tests/integration/deploy/kustomize_render_test.sh` for the reasons already mentioned.
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: Remove `tests/integration/ci/full_kind_up_test.sh` for the reasons already mentioned
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
